name: Doomsday

goal_sequence.action: cantrip aggressively (Brainstorm/Ponder/Gitaxian) to find Doomsday + BBB
Cast Doomsday (pay half life), build 5-card pile (Wraith/Edge/Oracle/U-source/cycle)
Cycle Street Wraith (-2 life) through pile, cast Thassa's Oracle (UU), win when library empty

notes: Doomsday combo — pay (life/2) to cast DD, build pile, cycle down to Oracle. Pile must include UU source + Oracle. Life total under 10 after DD cast — race with protection.
